nasb.text: Now, behold, the cry of the sons of Israel has come to Me; furthermore, I have seen the oppression with which the Egyptians are oppressing them.

esv.text: And now, behold, the cry of the people of Israel has come to me, and I have also seen the oppression with which the Egyptians oppress them.

cnv.text: 現在以色列人的呼聲已經達到我的面前，我也看見了埃及人對他們所施的壓迫。

ccb.text: 现在，以色列人的呼求传到我耳中，我也看到了埃及人怎样压迫他们。
